languages.text: Тело женщины порублено на куски и разложено по ящикам "служителям", "охотникам", "остальным".

traits.locale_text: Тело женщины порублено на куски и разложено по ящикам "служителям", "охотникам", "остальным".
Тело женщины порублено на куски и разложено по ящикам "служителям", "охотникам", "остальным".

languages.text: The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labelled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."
languages.original_text: Тело женщины порублено на куски и разложено по ящикам "служителям", "охотникам", "остальным".

traits.locale_text: The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labeled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."

The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labelled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."

languages.text: Der Körper der Frau wird in Stücke gehackt und in Kisten mit der Aufschrift 'für Diener', 'für Jäger', 'für den Rest' gelegt."
languages.original_text: The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labelled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."

languages.text: Le corps de la femme est découpé en morceaux et déposé dans des boîtes étiquetées "pour les domestiques", "pour les chasseurs", "pour les autres".
languages.original_text: The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labelled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."

languages.text: 女人的尸体被剁成碎块，放进贴有'给仆人'、'给猎人'、'给其他人'标签的箱子里"。
languages.original_text: The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labelled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."

languages.text: El cuerpo de la mujer es troceado y depositado en cajas etiquetadas como 'para los sirvientes', 'para los cazadores', 'para el resto'".
languages.original_text: The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labelled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."

languages.text: 女性の遺体は切り刻まれ、"使用人用"、"猟師用"、"その他用 "と書かれた箱に入れられる。
languages.original_text: The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labelled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."

languages.text: Kadının cesedi parçalara ayrılır ve 'hizmetçiler için', 'avcılar için', 'geri kalanlar için' yazan kutulara konur."
languages.original_text: The woman's body is chopped into pieces and laid into boxes labelled 'for servants', 'for hunters', 'for the rest'."
